nodes.name: San Francisco
nodes.summary: City implementing a universal basic income pilot program to address housing affordability crisis.

nodes.name: Universal Basic Income Pilot Program
nodes.summary: Program providing $1,000 per month to 1,000 residents for two years.

nodes.name: Residents
nodes.summary: Recipients of the universal basic income pilot program.

nodes.name: Business Groups
nodes.summary: Groups opposing the tax on commercial real estate transactions.

nodes.name: Commercial Real Estate Transactions
nodes.summary: Transactions subject to a 0.5% tax to fund the pilot program.

nodes.name: Tax on Commercial Real Estate
nodes.summary: 0.5% tax on transactions above $5 million to fund the universal basic income pilot program.

nodes.name: Housing Affordability Crisis
nodes.summary: Severe crisis in San Francisco with median rent exceeding $3,500 per month.

nodes.name: Court
nodes.summary: Entity where business groups plan to challenge the tax.
